name: lexiklar
description: Offline German dictionary with deep grammar support

scripts.dev: npm run build-index && tsx scripts/copy-data.ts && vite
scripts.build: npm run build-index && tsx scripts/copy-data.ts && vite build
scripts.build:mobile: npm run sync-version && npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.data:checkpoint: git add data/words/ data/examples.json && (git diff --staged --quiet && echo 'Checkpoint: nothing changed.' || git commit -m 'data: checkpoint LLM-generated translations')
scripts.pipeline: npm run download && npm run download-corpus && npm run transform -- --max-frequency 8000 --max-subtitle-rank 25000 && npm run enrich && npm run translate-glosses && npm run translate-glosses:full && npm run translate-examples && npm run build-index
scripts.pipeline:seed: npm run transform -- --seed && npm run enrich && npm run translate-glosses && npm run translate-glosses:full && npm run translate-examples && npm run build-index
scripts.deploy: rm -f dist/data/lexiklar.db && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name lexiklar --commit-dirty=true
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push && git push --tags
